HomeTeamWins.description: Number of wins by the home team on in the series. Note: this is for postseason series only.

AwayTeamWins.description: Number of wins by the away team in the series. Note: This is for postseason series only.

GameNumber.description: Game number in series. Note: this applies to postseason series only.

MaxLength.description: Maximum number of games in the series. Note: this is for postseason series only.
